title: phaseolus pilosus var. genuinus
intro: Phaseolus pilosus var. genuinus, also known as the rough bean or hairy bean, is a plant species belonging to the family Fabaceae. This plant is used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Phaseolus pilosus var. genuinus include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce blood pressure, and exhibit antioxidant activities, making it a valuable remedy for managing various health conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
